one_time_description: Misappropriation of cash receipts for tenant rents and service fees by a former employee; estimated loss of ~$10,000 for year ended March 31, 2021 (and ~$100,000 for year ended March 31, 2022)
economic_notes: Band has investments in 9086 Investments Ltd. (100%), Swl'eps Limited Partnership (100%), Swl'eps Operating Corporation (100%), and Nmimhl Tmixw Holding Corporation (100%). Swl'eps Limited Partnership reported revenue of $2,790,527 and net income of $134,592. COVID-19 pandemic continued to impact operations.
notes: Audit is qualified due to misappropriation of cash by a former employee (~$10,000 for FY2021, ~$100,000 for FY2022). Four entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): 9086 Investments Ltd., Swl'eps Limited Partnership, Swl'eps Operating Corporation, Nmimhl Tmixw Holding Corporation. Financial statements were filed late — audit signed June 23, 2023 for March 31, 2021 year-end. Prior year audited by a different auditor. Restricted cash of $151,166 represents CMHC replacement reserve ($122,897) and operating reserve ($28,269). Ottawa Trust Fund balance of $518,852 included in accumulated surplus. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements.
